projects.name: Slope Center-of-Mass (CoM) Assistance System for Human Gait
projects.summary: Designed an experimental testbed to deliver dynamic traction (200 N peak) with <5% force error. Developed STM32-based control for high-fidelity motor torque regulation and achieved 20-30% reduction in metabolic cost.

projects.name: Autonomous UAV Mission Navigation via Fast-Planner
projects.summary: Deployed Fast-Planner on ROS for real-time trajectory generation. Engineered custom circular benchmark tracks in RViz and validated obstacle avoidance efficacy through autonomous traversal.

projects.name: ROS2-Based Mobile Manipulator with Multimodal HRI
projects.summary: Architected a ROS2 mobile manipulator with SLAM (SLAM Toolbox) and Nav2. Integrated EKF for sensor fusion and MediaPipe/Vosk for gesture and voice-command interaction.

projects.name: Sim-to-Real Infrastructure for Closed-Loop Dexterous Hand
projects.summary: Refined URDF models and kinematic constraints for high-fidelity physics engines. Established RL grasping pipelines in NVIDIA Isaac Sim and Webots for Sim-to-Real transfer.

projects.name: Autonomous Intelligent Rescue Vehicle (National Competition)
projects.summary: Led the team to win National Second Prize. Programmed STM32 FSM for chassis kinematics and deployed YOLOv11 for real-time multi-class object recognition.

projects.name: CV-Guided 6-DOF Robotic Sketching System
projects.summary: Developed OpenCV pipeline for sub-pixel contour extraction. Solved 6-DOF Inverse Kinematics via D-H parameters for precision sketching on planar and curved surfaces.

education.institution: Southern University of Science and Technology
courses: Core: ROS(100), Mechanics of Materials(100), Robot Modeling & Control(97), Mechanical Design(97), Control Engineering(90)
